# Review — Graphify course complete

- [ ] `.graphifyignore` committed

## Keep using Graphify

```bash
graphify . --update
graphify hook install
graphify query "how does the cart work?"
```

## SimpleShop reminder

Run the shop with `npm run dev` and read `docs/SHOP.md`.
